productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Printed Grey Top
description: Style NoteThis dare-devil T-shirt from united colors of benetton for men is an off-duty essential. Wear this with your favourite denims and colourful canvas shoes.Product Details Grey round neck T-shirt with short sleeves and graphic print Material and Care100% cotton Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Size and FitRegular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
